statement: In every magma, Equation 2529 (`x = (y * ((x * z) * w)) * u`) implies Equation 1292 (`x = y * (((x * y) * z) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0250
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op (op x z) w)) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op (op x y) z) y))
